scripts.build: npm run build:client && npm run build:server
scripts.deploy:prod: node --input-type=module -e "import fs from 'node:fs'; const p='appsscript.json'; const j=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(p,'utf8')); j.webapp={...(j.webapp||{}),executeAs:'USER_DEPLOYING',access:'ANYONE_ANONYMOUS'}; fs.writeFileSync(p, JSON.stringify(j,null,2)+'\n'); console.log('appsscript webapp configured: USER_DEPLOYING + ANYONE_ANONYMOUS');" && npm run build && clasp push && V=$(clasp version "prod update $(date '+%F %T')" | sed -E 's/.*Created version ([0-9]+).*/\1/') && DID=${DEPLOYMENT_ID:-$(clasp deployments | sed -nE 's/^- ([^ ]+) @([0-9]+).*/\1 \2/p' | sort -k2,2nr | head -n1 | awk '{print $1}')} && if [ -z "$DID" ]; then echo "ERROR: Khong tim thay deployment dang ton tai. Hay truyen DEPLOYMENT_ID."; exit 1; fi && echo "Deploy to: $DID (version $V)" && clasp deploy -i "$DID" -V "$V" -d "prod"
